title: Extra food plus
description: This mod adds a bit of variety to your in‑game diet! It introduces a wide range of foods inspired by different real‑world countries, all within Minecraft’s vanilla setting
body:
![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e00eb69e1b0e2e1e542e9316a0201fb6dba46e_0.webp)
# **🍽️ What is Extra Food Plus?**

**Extra Food Plus (also known as Food+) is a cozy, fantasy‑friendly mod that expands your Minecraft diet with delicious new recipes, magical meals, and cultural flavors from around the world 🌍. Whether you're a survivalist, a builder, or a roleplayer, this mod brings warmth and variety to your table!**
## **🥖 What's Included?**
   New food items like the hearty Baguette, crafted from hay bales for extra saturation
   Soups and pies — from Carrot Soup to Apple Pie, each with unique effects and recipes
   Balanced gameplay — early game snacks and late game magical feasts
   Vanilla-friendly style — everything blends naturally into Minecraft’s original look and feel

## **✨ Why Use Food+?**
   Adds depth to farming and cooking
   Perfect for fantasy, medieval, or cozy survival worlds
   Easy to install and compatible with other mods
   Great for modpacks, roleplay servers, and builders who love detail
    
## **📦 Future Plans**
   More regional dishes (Asian, European, Slavic, and more!)
   Creative tab support
   Magical food with potion effects
   Cooking tools and ingredients
   Hidden achievements and food lore

## **🧐 FAQ**
**A**: What is Food+? 

**B**: Food+ is a cozy, fantasy‑friendly mod that adds new recipes, soups, pies, and bread to Minecraft 🍞🥧🥕. It expands the vanilla diet with delicious meals inspired by real cultures.

**A**: Is Food+ compatible with other mods? 

**B**: Yes ✅. Food+ is designed to be vanilla‑friendly, so it should work well with most other mods.

**A**: How do I craft the new foods? 

**B**: On the crafting table🫠.

**A**: Does Food+ add magical food? 

**B**: Not yet ✨, but future versions will include magical meals with potion effects and hidden achievements.

**A**: Where can I find the new items in Creative Mode? 

**B**: All items are currently organized in the Food and Items creative tab 🍽️.

**A**: Who made Food+? 

**B**: Food+ was created with love by Zebrar 💻. It’s my first public Minecraft mod, and I’m excited to share it with you! 🎉

### 🧑‍🍳 Credits

> Created with love by **Zebrar**.
